::: {.ai-button}
<button class="ai-button" onclick="openFlintActivity(this)">🤖 AI Help</button>

<script>
function openFlintActivity(button) {
    const exercise = button.closest('.exercise');

    // Collect metadata from data-* attributes
    const metadata = {};
    Array.from(exercise.attributes).forEach(attr => {
        if (attr.name.startsWith('data-')) {
            metadata[attr.name.replace('data-', '')] = attr.value;
        }
    });

    // Encode metadata as query parameters
    const params = new URLSearchParams(metadata).toString();

    // Open Flint activity in a new tab with metadata
    const flintURL = `https://flint.ai/activity?${params}`; // <-- Replace with actual Flint activity URL
    window.open(flintURL, '_blank');
}
</script>

<style>
.ai-button {
    background-color: #4f46e5;
    color: white;
    border: none;
    padding: 0.4em 0.8em;
    border-radius: 0.25rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: bold;
    margin-bottom: 0.5em;
}
.ai-button:hover {
    background-color: #3730a3;
}
</style>
:::
